## Meeting Purpose

[Strategize and align on ongoing client projects, particularly focusing on Airbyte, Fathom, Augment, and Metronome.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte needs accelerated content production (from 10 to 100+ pages/week) and a clear execution plan](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Fathom requires a concrete, action-oriented update focusing on traffic recovery and site improvement](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Augment project is progressing with multiple stakeholder meetings and newsletter development](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Metronome kickoff preparation is underway, with a focus on competitor analysis and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

## Topics

### Airbyte Content Acceleration

  - [Current production: 10 pages/week, aiming to ramp up to 100+ pages/month](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Plan to identify 1,000+ top-level assignments with 5M+ monthly searches](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Goal: Accelerate content production to complete 5,000 pages faster (years to months)](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Strategy: Focus on one lane (e.g., programmatic content) to show immediate progress](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Potential upsell: Additional 15K for increased content production (100+ more pages/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

### Fathom Project Update

  - [Need for concrete, action-oriented update due to 50% traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Dave to create a one-pager outlining:](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [Plan of attack for different content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Timeline for seeing momentum](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Concrete steps for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Focus on communicating designs, mocks, and prototypes for topical clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Deep dive planned with Fathom team to address technical issues and state-level pages](https://fathom.video/share/Q6a72QNus9efCan44_w-8x1kUWfuEztN?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
